description: Initialize Astro 5 project with React integration, Tailwind CSS v4, and Vercel adapter
steps_to_verify: package.json exists with astro, @astrojs/react, @astrojs/vercel, tailwindcss, @tailwindcss/vite dependencies
astro.config.mjs has output: 'static', vercel() adapter, react() integration, and @tailwindcss/vite plugin
npm run dev starts without errors on localhost

description: Define Tailwind v4 theme with earth-tone color palette, serif/sans-serif typography pairing (DM Serif Display + Inter), and generous spacing tokens
steps_to_verify: src/styles/global.css contains @theme block with colors: cream, warm-white, sand, clay, earth, bark, charcoal, forest, sage, moss
Google Fonts imported for DM Serif Display and Inter
Headings render in DM Serif Display, body text in Inter
Section spacing uses 8rem desktop / 5rem mobile tokens
Background is cream (#FAF8F5), text is charcoal (#2D2A26)

description: BaseLayout component wrapping all pages with Header, Footer, and SEO meta tags
steps_to_verify: BaseLayout.astro accepts title, description, ogImage props and renders them in <head>
SEO.astro renders <title>, meta description, Open Graph, and Twitter card tags
All three pages (/, /gallery, /contact) use BaseLayout and render correctly

description: Sticky header with logo text and nav links (Home, Gallery, Contact), transparent over hero, backdrop-blur when scrolled
steps_to_verify: Header displays 'El Rabón' logo on the left in serif font
Three nav links on the right: Home, Gallery, Contact
Header is transparent at top of page, gains background + backdrop-blur on scroll
Mobile (<768px): nav collapses to hamburger menu that toggles open/closed
Desktop (≥768px): nav links display inline horizontally
Active page link is visually distinguished

description: Minimal footer with farm name, tagline, and copyright on dark background
steps_to_verify: Footer has bg-charcoal with cream text
Displays farm name, short tagline, and copyright with current year
Renders consistently on all three pages
Mobile: px-6 py-12, Desktop: px-16 py-16

description: Full-viewport-height hero with background farm image, centered farm name in large serif, tagline, and scroll indicator
steps_to_verify: Hero takes full viewport height (100vh)
Background image is full-width with object-cover
Farm name displayed in large serif font, centered
Tagline displayed below farm name
Animated scroll-down indicator (chevron) visible at bottom
Text is readable over the image (overlay or text shadow)
Mobile: title text-4xl, px-6. Tablet: text-5xl, px-12. Desktop: text-6xl, px-16

description: Two-column section with farm photo and short description text
steps_to_verify: Desktop (≥768px): image on left, text on right in two-column grid
Mobile (<768px): stacks vertically, image above text, full width
Contains 2-3 sentences about the farm
Mobile: px-6 py-16, gap-8. Desktop: px-12 py-32, gap-16
Image uses Astro <Image> component for optimization

description: Grid of 3-4 farm images with hover effects and link to full gallery page
steps_to_verify: Mobile (<640px): grid-cols-1. Tablet (640-1024px): grid-cols-2. Desktop (≥1024px): grid-cols-3 or grid-cols-4
Images have aspect-[4/3] ratio consistently
Images have subtle hover effect (scale + shadow)
'View Full Gallery' link navigates to /gallery
Mobile: px-6 gap-4. Tablet: px-12 gap-6. Desktop: px-16 gap-8

description: Call-to-action section with warm background inviting event inquiries, with button linking to contact page
steps_to_verify: Section has warm-white or sand background color
Centered text about hosting events at the farm
Mobile: heading text-2xl, button w-full, px-6 py-16
Desktop: heading text-3xl, button w-auto px-8, px-16 py-24
Button styled with bg-forest text-cream, hover darkening effect
Button navigates to /contact

description: Dedicated gallery page with responsive photo grid displaying all farm images
steps_to_verify: Page has title 'Gallery' with subtitle
Mobile (<640px): grid-cols-1 gap-4 px-4. Tablet (640-1024px): grid-cols-2 gap-6 px-8. Desktop (≥1024px): grid-cols-3 gap-6 px-16
Each image has rounded corners, subtle shadow, hover scale effect
Images have aspect-[4/3] and use Astro <Image> with lazy loading
Clicking an image opens the lightbox

description: React lightbox component for full-size image viewing with keyboard navigation
steps_to_verify: Lightbox opens as modal overlay when gallery image is clicked
Displays current image at large size
Previous/next arrow buttons navigate between images
Left/right arrow keys navigate between images
Escape key closes the lightbox
Clicking outside the image closes the lightbox
Body scroll is locked while lightbox is open
Smooth fade-in/fade-out transitions
Mobile: max-w-[95vw] max-h-[85vh], nav arrows inside image area, touch swipe support
Desktop: max-w-[85vw] max-h-[85vh], nav arrows outside image
Component uses client:load directive

description: Contact page with two-column layout: form on left, farm info on right
steps_to_verify: Desktop (≥768px): grid-cols-[2fr_1fr] with gap-16, px-16 py-32
Mobile (<768px): single column, form above info, gap-8, px-6 py-16
Contact info section shows farm address and contact details
Map placeholder present with note or static image

description: React contact form with name, email, event type dropdown, and message fields with client-side validation
steps_to_verify: Form has fields: Name (text), Email (email), Event Type (select), Message (textarea)
Event Type options: Wedding, Corporate Event, Private Party, Photography/Film, Other
Required fields show validation errors when submitted empty
Email field validates email format
Mobile: submit button w-full. Desktop: submit button w-auto px-10
Submit button styled bg-forest text-cream
Component uses client:load directive

description: Astro SSR endpoint at /api/contact that receives form submissions and validates input
steps_to_verify: src/pages/api/contact.ts has export const prerender = false
POST handler accepts JSON with name, email, eventType, message
Returns 400 with error message if required fields missing
Returns 400 if email format is invalid
Returns 200 with success: true on valid submission
Logs submission data to console (Vercel function logs)
ContactForm.tsx shows success message on 200 response
ContactForm.tsx shows error message on non-200 response

description: 8-10 placeholder farm/landscape photos from Unsplash placed in src/assets/images/
steps_to_verify: At least 8 images exist in src/assets/images/
Hero image is at least 2400px wide
Gallery images are at least 1200px wide
Images are descriptively named (e.g., hero-farm-landscape.jpg)
All images render correctly throughout the site

description: All pages and components render correctly across mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints per the responsive specs
steps_to_verify: 375px (mobile): single-column layouts, hamburger nav, readable text, full-width buttons
768px (tablet): two-column where specified, appropriate padding transitions
1024px (laptop): full desktop layout, expanded nav, 3-col gallery grid
1440px (large desktop): content properly contained, no horizontal scroll
Images scale appropriately at all breakpoints with consistent aspect-[4/3]
Touch targets are at least 44px on mobile
All spacing, font sizes, and grid columns match the per-component responsive specs

description: Project builds successfully and deploys to Vercel with static pages and SSR contact endpoint
steps_to_verify: npm run build completes without errors
Static pages are generated for /, /gallery, /contact
/api/contact is deployed as Vercel serverless function
Lighthouse Performance score >= 90
Lighthouse Accessibility score >= 90
Lighthouse SEO score >= 90

description: Export real farm photos from macOS Photos library (album: 'El Rabon') to tmp/el-rabon-export/
steps_to_verify: All photos from 'El Rabon' album in Photos.app are exported to tmp/el-rabon-export/
Exported images are JPEG format: IMG_3815, IMG_3884, IMG_3969, IMG_4076, IMG_4090, IMG_4117, IMG_4118, IMG_4119, IMG_4120

description: Remove old placeholder images and copy real farm photos into src/assets/images/ with descriptive filenames
steps_to_verify: Old placeholder images are removed from src/assets/images/
IMG_3969 (deck viewpoint, ocean) is copied as hero image
IMG_3815 (stone cottage) is copied as about section image
Remaining 7 photos (IMG_3884, IMG_4076, IMG_4090, IMG_4117, IMG_4118, IMG_4119, IMG_4120) are copied as gallery images
All filenames are descriptive and match their content

category: Real Farm Assets — Update Code References
description: Update all image imports in Astro pages to reference the new real photo filenames
steps_to_verify: All imports in src/pages/index.astro are updated (hero, about, 4 gallery previews)
All imports in src/pages/gallery.astro are updated (all gallery images)
Hero image, about image, gallery previews, and full gallery all render correctly with real photos
Lightbox displays real photos correctly at full resolution
Build completes without errors (pnpm run build)

description: Video files from the El Rabon album (3 .mov + 1 .mp4) are available in tmp/el-rabon-export/ for future use
steps_to_verify: Video files preserved in tmp/el-rabon-export/: IMG_3815.mov, IMG_3884.mov, IMG_3969.mov, IMG_4083.mp4

description: Replace placeholder address with the real farm address from Google Maps (https://maps.app.goo.gl/u9VCo6Y6aEijXpWp6, coordinates: 28.366179, -16.412216) in the contact page info section
steps_to_verify: Address in src/pages/contact.astro is updated from placeholder 'Camino Rural s/n, Valle del Rabón, México' to the real address resolved from the Google Maps link
Address text is clickable and opens Google Maps at the correct location
Phone number and email are updated if real values are available

description: Replace the 'Map coming soon' placeholder with an embedded Google Maps iframe showing the farm location
steps_to_verify: The placeholder div in src/pages/contact.astro is replaced with a Google Maps embed iframe
Map is centered on the farm coordinates (28.366179, -16.412216)
Map iframe has aspect-[4/3] and rounded corners matching the existing placeholder style
Map is responsive and displays correctly on mobile and desktop
Map loads without errors and shows the correct pin location
